name: widget-platform-hooks
description: Deterministic reliability hooks for the widget-platform comparator loop. Three hooks: (1) intercepts inspect_screen's device-tree result and uploads it directly to widget-platform's backend, handing the calling model back a small reference id instead of the full tree - avoids the tool-call-argument retyping failures that otherwise happen when a large device tree has to be reproduced as text; (2) generates a real, scannable QR code for a widget's deeplink the moment launch_widget_on_device creates it, saved locally with an instruction to include it in the final report; (3) reinforces advance_comparator_loop's own round_report field with a loud, separate instruction so the mandatory per-round score reporting doesn't silently stay buried in a JSON blob.
